title: Home page shows the book library list
description: Verifies the home page loads and displays a visible list of books for browsing.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the page

title: Scroll through the book list to discover additional books
description: Verifies that the user can scroll the home page and continue to see book items in the library list.

steps.description: Scroll to the middle of the page
Scroll to the bottom of the page

title: Open a book details page from the home library list
description: Verifies that selecting a book from the home list navigates to a book details page showing metadata.

steps.description: Click on the first visible book card in the list

title: Open a book details page after scrolling down the library list
description: Verifies that selecting a book further down the list after scrolling still opens its details page.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the page
Click on a visible book card near the bottom of the list

title: Graceful handling when the library has no visible books
description: Verifies that if the library list is empty, the home page shows a clear empty-state message instead of a broken layout.

title: View book details metadata on Book Detail page
description: Verifies that a visitor can open a book detail page and see key metadata and the Read action.

steps.description: Click on the first visible "Read" button on the page
Verify at least one of these is visible: text "Author", text "Description", or text "About"

title: Start reading from Book Detail when already authenticated
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can open a book detail page and enter the reader from the Read button.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email input field
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password input field
Click on the first visible "Read" button on the page

title: Authenticated user can reach reader repeatedly from Book Detail
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can start reading again without being sent back to auth.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email input field
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password input field
Click on the first visible "Read" button on the page

title: Open EPUB reader from a book and verify content loads (authenticated)
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the reader for a book and see reading content load.

steps.description: Click on a book card from the library/home list

title: Reader navigation: Next then Previous updates visible reading position (authenticated)
description: Verifies next/previous reader controls are usable and the visible reading location changes.

steps.description: Click on a book card from the library/home list

title: Reader seek/navigation via table of contents (authenticated)
description: Verifies a user can jump to a different section using a seek control such as table of contents.

steps.description: Click on a book card from the library/home list
Click the "Table of contents" or "Chapters" control
Click on a chapter/section item in the list

title: Close reader returns to the book details page for the same book (authenticated)
description: Verifies the Close action exits the reader and returns the user to the corresponding book details page.

steps.description: Click on a book card from the library/home list
Verify element "Read" or "Open Reader" button is visible

title: Reader UI shows core controls when content is loaded (authenticated)
description: Verifies that key reader controls (next/previous/close) are visible once the reader is open.

steps.description: Click on a book card from the library/home list

title: Reader remains usable after repeated Next navigation (authenticated)
description: Verifies repeated use of Next does not break the reader UI and controls remain available.

steps.description: Click on a book card from the library/home list

title: View profile details as an authenticated user
description: Verifies a signed-in user can access the Profile page and see their profile details.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" link in the main navigation

title: Edit profile and save changes successfully
description: Verifies a signed-in user can edit profile fields on the Edit Profile page and see updates reflected back on the Profile page.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" link in the main navigation

title: Edit profile and verify updated values appear on Profile page
description: Verifies that after saving edits, the user is returned to Profile and can see the updated information displayed.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" link in the main navigation
Type "Updated Test Name" into the name field

title: Cancel out of Edit Profile without saving
description: Verifies a signed-in user can leave the Edit Profile page using a cancel/back control without saving changes.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" link in the main navigation

title: Attempt to save profile with an empty required field
description: Verifies the Edit Profile form shows a visible validation message when a required field is cleared and Save is clicked.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" link in the main navigation

title: Save valid profile changes and return to Profile
description: Verifies a user can save valid edits on Edit Profile, see success confirmation, and be redirected to the Profile page.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click the "Edit Profile" link or button
Fill "Updated Display Name" into the display name field

title: Invalid profile data shows validation message and remains on Edit Profile
description: Verifies invalid edits are blocked with a visible validation error and the user stays on the Edit Profile page.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click the "Edit Profile" link or button
Fill " " into the display name field

title: Cancel editing returns to Profile without saving
description: Verifies the user can abandon edits using Cancel/Back and return to Profile without seeing a save confirmation.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click the "Edit Profile" link or button
Fill "Temporary Name Change" into the display name field
Verify text "Profile updated" is not visible

title: Save button disabled or prevents submission when required field is empty
description: Verifies the UI prevents submission when a required field is empty (either by disabling Save or showing immediate error).

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click the "Edit Profile" link or button
Fill "" into the display name field

title: Profile changes persist after successful save and reload of Profile view
description: Verifies that after saving edits, the Profile page shows the updated value when revisited in the same session.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click the "Edit Profile" link or button
Fill "Persistent Name" into the display name field

title: Validation error clears after correcting the field and saving successfully
description: Verifies a user can fix invalid input, see the validation error disappear, and then save successfully.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click the "Edit Profile" link or button
Fill "" into the display name field
Fill "Corrected Name" into the display name field

title: View notifications list when authenticated
description: Verifies an authenticated user can reach Notifications and see a list (or an empty-state message) rendered.

steps.description: Click on "Notifications" in the main navigation

title: Open a notification and view its details
description: Verifies a user can open a notification from the list and see a details view.

steps.description: Click on "Notifications" in the main navigation
Click on the first notification in the list

title: Mark a notification as read from the details view
description: Verifies marking a notification as read updates the UI to show it is read.

steps.description: Click on "Notifications" in the main navigation
Click on the first notification in the list

title: Mark as read is disabled or hidden for an already-read notification
description: Verifies the UI prevents re-marking an already-read notification (no actionable 'Mark as read' control).

steps.description: Click on "Notifications" in the main navigation
Click on a notification that is labeled "Read"
Verify element "Mark as read" is not visible

title: Notifications page supports empty state when user has no notifications
description: Verifies an empty-state message is shown when there are zero notifications.

steps.description: Click on "Notifications" in the main navigation

title: Save settings successfully shows confirmation message
description: Verifies an authenticated user can toggle a setting, save, and see a 'Settings saved' confirmation on the Settings page.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click the "Settings" link in the app navigation/menu
Toggle a setting on the Settings page

title: Settings page loads for authenticated user
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the Settings page and sees expected page content.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click the "Settings" link in the app navigation/menu

title: Saving without changing any setting still shows confirmation
description: Verifies clicking Save without toggling any setting does not crash and shows a successful save confirmation (if supported).

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click the "Settings" link in the app navigation/menu

title: Toggling a setting updates the UI state immediately
description: Verifies a setting can be toggled and the new state is visually reflected before saving.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click the "Settings" link in the app navigation/menu
Verify element "a settings toggle control" is visible
Toggle a setting on the Settings page
Verify element "the same settings toggle control in its new state" is visible

title: Multiple toggles can be changed and saved together
description: Verifies a user can change more than one setting and save once with a single success confirmation.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click the "Settings" link in the app navigation/menu
Toggle a first setting on the Settings page
Toggle a second setting on the Settings page

title: Join group successfully from Group Join Gate and reach Profile
description: Verifies an eligible user can join a group from /join, see confirmation, and be redirected to /profile.

title: Group Join Gate shows confirmation after successful join
description: Verifies the UI shows a visible confirmation state/message after a successful join attempt.

title: Successful join redirects from /join to /profile
description: Verifies that after an allowed join, the user is redirected to the Profile page.

title: Access denied message shown when join is not allowed
description: Verifies the UI shows an access denied message when the join request is rejected.

title: Access denied state provides a contact admin link
description: Verifies that when access is denied, a visible link to contact an admin is shown.

title: Group gate information is visible on initial load of /join
description: Verifies the Group Join Gate page renders informative content before any join action.

title: Join group button is not duplicated after multiple clicks
description: Verifies repeated clicking does not create duplicate visible join controls or multiple confirmation messages.

title: Admin can access Admin Panel and see admin controls
description: Verifies an authenticated admin user can open the Admin Panel and view available admin controls.

steps.description: Click the "Admin" link in the main navigation/menu

title: Admin performs an admin action and sees a success message
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can perform an admin action (example: remove a book) and sees a success confirmation.

steps.description: Click the "Admin" link in the main navigation/menu
Click the "Remove" button for a book in the admin content list

title: Non-admin is denied access to Admin Panel and redirected home
description: Verifies an authenticated non-admin user is shown an insufficient permissions message when attempting to access /admin and is redirected to home.

title: Authenticated user who is not admin sees insufficient permissions when opening /admin from UI
description: Verifies a signed-in user without admin rights is blocked when attempting to open the Admin Panel from navigation and is returned to home.

steps.description: Click the "Admin" link in the main navigation/menu

title: Admin Panel page loads and shows user management section (if present)
description: Verifies the Admin Panel renders expected management sections such as user management when accessed by an admin.

steps.description: Click the "Admin" link in the main navigation/menu

title: Admin Panel shows a visible error when an admin action is attempted with missing required input (if applicable)
description: Verifies validation/feedback appears when an admin tries to perform an action without providing required input (e.g., empty search/filter or missing selection).

steps.description: Click the "Admin" link in the main navigation/menu
Click the "Apply" button for a filter/action without selecting any required options

title: View a member public profile from Home and follow successfully
description: Verifies a user can open a public member profile and follow the member with a visible confirmation.

steps.description: Click on a visible member name or member link in the UI

title: Follow confirmation persists on the member profile page after reload
description: Verifies that after following a member, the profile continues to show the followed state after a page reload.

steps.description: Click on a visible member name or member link in the UI
Click on the same member name or member link used earlier

title: Member profile page shows key public profile sections
description: Verifies the public member profile page renders primary visible sections (name and public details area).

steps.description: Click on a visible member name or member link in the UI
Verify element "Member profile header" is visible
Verify element "Public profile details section" is visible

title: Member not found is handled with a back link to Home
description: Verifies the app shows a "Member not found" style message and provides a visible back link to the home page.

steps.description: Verify text "Member not found" is visible

title: Network or load error on member profile shows recoverable UI and back link
description: Verifies that when the profile cannot be loaded, an error message is shown and the user can return home via a back link.

title: Open Privacy page from direct URL and view policy content
description: Verifies that a visitor can access the Privacy page and see privacy policy content.

steps.description: Verify element "Privacy policy content" is visible

title: Privacy page is accessible without logging in
description: Verifies that the Privacy page is available to unauthenticated visitors and displays policy content.

steps.description: Verify element "Privacy policy content" is visible
Verify text "Page failed to load" is not visible

title: Privacy page content is readable and not empty
description: Verifies that the Privacy policy area renders substantive visible text rather than an empty state.

steps.description: Verify element "Privacy policy content" is visible

title: Navigate to Privacy page from Home page link
description: Verifies that a visitor can reach the Privacy page via a UI link starting from the Home page.

steps.description: Verify element "Privacy policy content" is visible
